title: [release-1.19] run: add container gid to additional groups
body:
When container is created with specific uid and gid also add container gid to supplementary/additional group.

Cherry-picked from https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4207, related to https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rc4r-wh2q-q6c4.
